sentences.text: Hey, Peter, this is Jordan Cope over at a rental. I'm sorry, I missed you. I know it's getting late on a Friday afternoon. I was actually just reaching out to see if you'd be the best person to

speak to regarding marketing for your available units at I P N G is so would love if you could give me a call back and talk for a minute or two number is three one seven seven two zero three two six six and again. This is Jordan Cope over our rental thanks have a great weekend.
